known_scientific_blockers: The public sentiment test was repeatedly inspected in earlier development and is not an untouched confirmatory set
The locked confirmatory result did not establish joint NEWS and DISCLOSURE superiority; the candidate was not promoted
No independent human financial-expert annotation or human inter-annotator agreement
The confirmatory candidates overlap the auxiliary-data calendar period and do not establish out-of-time generalization
Disclosure QWK improvement has a cluster-bootstrap lower bound close to zero and needs additional periods
No DOI-backed anonymous dataset archive yet
